title: thlaspi rotundifolium
intro: Thlaspi rotundifolium, also known as round-leaf penny-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to its high concentration of glucosinolates and isothiocyanates. The health benefits of Thlaspi rotundifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Thlaspi rotundifolium can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
